cards.english: Peppa and her family are visiting Uncle Pig, Aunt Pig, and her cousin Chloé.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E41 Chloe's Puppet Show［Chloe的布偶劇］
cards.characters: 我諗今次大哥應該又會好似平時噉
cards.jyutping: ngo5 nam2 gam1 ci3 daai6 go1 jing1 goi1 jau6 wui6 hou2 ci5 ping4 si4 gam2
cards.english: I think my uncle will probably be like usual this time.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E41 Chloe's Puppet Show［Chloe的布偶劇］
cards.jyutping: jat1 sik6 jyun4 aan3 zau6 fan3 zoek6 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: He always falls asleep after lunch.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E41 Chloe's Puppet Show［Chloe的布偶劇］
cards.characters: 爹哋啊，你唔應該噉樣講你大哥㗎
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 aa3 nei5 m4 jing1 goi1 gam2 joeng2 gong2 nei5 daai6 go1 gaa4
cards.english: Dad, you shouldn't talk about your older brother like that.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E41 Chloe's Puppet Show［Chloe的布偶劇］
cards.jyutping: dak6 bit6 hai6 hai2 baan1 sai3 lou2 min6 cin4
cards.english: Especially in front of the younger siblings.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E41 Chloe's Puppet Show［Chloe的布偶劇］
cards.jyutping: bat1 gwo3 hai6 zan1 gaa1 maa1

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E41 Chloe's Puppet Show［Chloe的布偶劇］
cards.jyutping: daai6 go1 keoi5 seng4 yat6 sik6 hou2 do1 je5
cards.english: Our older uncle always eats a lot.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E41 Chloe's Puppet Show［Chloe的布偶劇］
cards.characters: 然後即刻瞓着，扯鼻鼾又大聲好似噉
cards.jyutping: jin4 hau6 zik1 hak1 fan3 zoek6 ce2 bei6 hon4 jau6 daai6 sing1 hou2 ci5 gam2
cards.english: Then immediately falls asleep and snores really loudly like that.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E41 Chloe's Puppet Show［Chloe的布偶劇］
cards.characters: 你哋忘記我頭先講過嘅嘢啦
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 mong4 gei3 ngo5 tau4 sin1 gong2 gwo3 ge3 je5 laa1
cards.english: You two forget what I just said.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E41 Chloe's Puppet Show［Chloe的布偶劇］
cards.characters: 豬大伯呀，你係咪會好似平時噉
cards.jyutping: zyu1 daai6 baak3 aa1 nei5 hai6 mai6 wui6 hou2 ci5 ping4 si4 gam2
cards.english: Uncle Pig, will you be like usual?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E41 Chloe's Puppet Show［Chloe的布偶劇］
cards.jyutping: fan3 gaau3 tung4 ce2 bei6 hon4 gaa4

cards.english: What do you mean by saying that?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E41 Chloe's Puppet Show［Chloe的布偶劇］
cards.characters: 爹哋話你成日都好容易瞓着覺
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 waa6 nei5 seng4 yat6 dou1 hou2 jung4 ji6 fan3 zoek6 gaau3
cards.english: Daddy says you always fall asleep easily.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E41 Chloe's Puppet Show［Chloe的布偶劇］
cards.characters: 仲會好似噉樣大聲扯鼻鼾
cards.jyutping: zung6 wui6 hou2 ci5 gam2 joeng2 daai6 sing1 ce2 bei6 hon4
cards.english: And you snore loudly like this.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E41 Chloe's Puppet Show［Chloe的布偶劇］
cards.characters: 你爹哋講得啱，我成日都係噉㗎
cards.jyutping: nei5 de1 dei6 gong2 dak1 ngaam1 ngo5 seng4 yat6 dou1 hai6 gam2 gaa4
cards.english: Your Daddy is right, I'm always like this.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E41 Chloe's Puppet Show［Chloe的布偶劇］
cards.characters: 爹哋啊，你唔應該同佢哋噉樣講豬大伯㗎
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 aa3 nei5 m4 jing1 goi1 tung4 keoi5 dei6 gam2 joeng2 gong2 zyu1 daai6 baak3 gaa4
cards.english: Daddy, you shouldn't talk about Uncle Pig like that to them.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E41 Chloe's Puppet Show［Chloe的布偶劇］
cards.characters: 我諗佢哋兩個應該聽唔到啲細路講咩㗎喇
cards.jyutping: ngo5 nam2 keoi5 dei6 loeng5 go3 jing1 goi1 ting1 m4 dou3 di1 sai3 lou6 gong2 me1 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: I think the two of them probably can't hear what the kids are saying.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E41 Chloe's Puppet Show［Chloe的布偶劇］
cards.characters: 豬大伯同豬先生都瞓着咗喎
cards.jyutping: zyu1 daai6 baak3 tung4 zyu1 sin1 saang1 dou1 fan3 zoek6 zo2 wo3
cards.english: Uncle Pig and Mr. Pig have both fallen asleep.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E41 Chloe's Puppet Show［Chloe的布偶劇］

defs: anyway (to get back to a previous topic)
1. the short form of funs "粉絲" (of illegal drug) heroin
can, can do, able to do; work; helpful; ready
